def process_user_data(user_id: int) -> dict:
    return Utils.fetch_and_transform(user_id)


def calculate_order_total(order_id: str) -> float:
    return Utils.compute_pricing(order_id)


def send_notification(user_id: int, message: str):
    Common.dispatch_message(user_id, message)


class Utils:
    @staticmethod
    def fetch_and_transform(user_id: int) -> dict:
        raw = Database.query(f"SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = {user_id}")
        return Helpers.normalize_user(raw)

    @staticmethod
    def compute_pricing(order_id: str) -> float:
        items = Database.query(f"SELECT * FROM order_items WHERE order_id = {order_id}")
        return Helpers.apply_discounts(items)

    @staticmethod
    def dispatch_message(user_id: int, message: str):
        channel = Helpers.resolve_channel(user_id)
        channel.send(message)


class Common:
    @staticmethod
    def dispatch_message(user_id: int, message: str):
        Utils.dispatch_message(user_id, message)


class Helpers:
    @staticmethod
    def normalize_user(raw: dict) -> dict:
        return {"id": raw["id"], "name": raw["name"].strip()}

    @staticmethod
    def apply_discounts(items: list) -> float:
        return sum(item["price"] for item in items)

    @staticmethod
    def resolve_channel(user_id: int):
        return NotificationService()
